paper.title: Reimagining RAN Automation in 6G: An Agentic AI Framework with Hierarchical Online Decision Transformer
paper.summary: In this paper, we propose an Agentic Artificial Intelligence (AI) framework for wireless networks. At its core, the super agent is powered by a Hierarchical Online Decision Transformer (H-ODT)...

At its core, the super agent is powered by a Hierarchical Online Decision Transformer (H-ODT)...
